summary: Completed comprehensive production hardening testing for GuessIt Football Prediction Platform v1.5. All P0 and P1 upgrades successfully tested including reminder worker separation, race condition fixes, Redis caching, rate limiting, and WebSocket scaling.
passed_tests: Backend health check returns healthy status
System metrics endpoint shows WebSocket counts, Redis 'connected', MongoDB 'connected', and reminder_worker: 'separate process'
Admin login works with admin@guessit.com / Admin123! via cookie auth
User login works with test@example.com / Test123! via cookie auth
Prediction creation works with atomic upsert and compound unique index
Prediction upsert prevents duplicates - second POST to same match_id updates (is_new=false) with same prediction_id
Rate limiting blocks 16th prediction in 60s with 429 'Too many predictions'
Leaderboard API returns cached users array from Redis (30s TTL)
Weekly leaderboard returns users and week date ranges
Redis accessible and responding to ping commands
Reminder worker running as separate supervisor process
Compound unique index exists on predictions (user_id, match_id)
Homepage renders with GuessIt branding and navigation
Subscription plans API returns valid plans
